_comment: BRAIN MANIFEST — AI reads this to know its own capabilities. Even after brain/ is compiled to bytecode, this file tells the AI exactly what it can do.

identity.name: Flowork OS Mother AI
identity.description: Local-first AI operating system that can build apps, automate browsers, control multi-agent teams, and evolve by creating new tools.

architecture.protection: brain/ is READ-ONLY for AI. AI extends via tools/ directory.

agent_engine.description: Main execution loop — handles AI tick, tool dispatch, streaming, action parsing

agent_llm.description: LLM API clients — calls Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, Groq, Mistral, Together, Fireworks, Cohere, Ollama

agent_memory.description: Long-term memory — structured types, micro-compaction, FLOWORK.md hierarchy, aging, semantic search

agent_session_memory.description: Session persistence — auto-save, prompt suggestions, AutoDream consolidation, MagicDocs KB

agent_mode_router.description: Mode switching — App Builder, Node Builder, Browser AI, AI Assistant, Plan Mode

agent_commands.description: Slash commands — 21 commands for user shortcuts

agent_voice.description: Voice input — Native + Web Speech API fallback, Ctrl+Shift+V toggle

agent_thinking.description: Thinking modes — brief/extended + budget control for reasoning

agent_tool_schemas.description: Tool schema validation — 178 tool schemas + Plan Mode guard

brain_adapter.description: Main brain adapter — bridges agentTick() to floworkBrain.submitMessage()

brain_tool_bridge.description: Tool execution bridge — connects 213 tools to real handlers via Go API, WebSocket, browser APIs

brain_tool_registry.description: Tool catalog — 213 tools: 84 go_api, 25 ws_ipc, 8 browser_api, 26 window_global, 70 brain_native

brain_llm_adapter.description: Unified LLM adapter — normalizes all providers to Claude SDK format

brain_memory_bridge.description: Memory bridge — session persistence, auto-memory, AutoDream, prompt suggestion

brain_self_heal.description: Self-healing — crash listener + error monitor, auto-recovery

brain_evolution.description: AI evolution — custom tools, rules, skills that AI creates for itself

brain_swarm.description: Swarm intelligence — max 6 parallel workers for distributed tasks

brain_vision.description: Vision module — screenshot analysis via Gemini/Ollama vision

brain_mcp.description: MCP protocol client — filesystem server auto-connect, 14 tools

brain_native_dispatcher.description: Native tool dispatcher — routes all brain_native tools to real implementations

brain_nas.description: Neural Architecture Search — auto-optimize AI performance

brain_teams.description: Team manager — coordinate multiple agents on complex tasks

brain_lsp.description: LSP client — IDE intelligence for code editing

brain_plan_mode.description: Plan mode — structured planning before execution

brain_review.description: Self-review — AI reviews its own output before delivery

brain_cost_tracker.description: Cost tracking — API call counting and budget management

brain_permissions.description: Permission system — auto/manual approval for dangerous actions

brain_tts.description: TTS output — AI speaks via ElevenLabs, OpenAI TTS, Google Cloud, browser Web Speech API. Auto-speak mode.

brain_ears.description: Audio input & event triggers — Whisper transcription, file watchers, webhook listener with auto-injection

brain_crawler.description: Smart web crawling — readability extraction, site crawling, link following, rate limiting

brain_imagegen.description: Image generation — DALL-E 3, Gemini Imagen 3, Flux (Together AI). Auto-save to workspace.

brain_audiogen.description: Audio generation — ElevenLabs sound effects, OpenAI TTS-HD for speech/music

brain_daemon.description: Background daemon — scheduled tasks, cron intervals, event bus for inter-module communication

FLOWORKOS_model_failover.description: Auto-failover between AI providers when primary fails

FLOWORKOS_loop_detector.description: Detects when AI gets stuck in tool call loops

FLOWORKOS_compaction.description: Smart context compression — keeps conversation within token limits

FLOWORKOS_usage_tracking.description: Tracks API usage, tokens, costs per session

FLOWORKOS_tool_policy.description: Policy engine — controls which tools AI can use and when

FLOWORKOS_redaction.description: Payload redaction — removes sensitive data before sending to LLM

FLOWORKOS_session_manager.description: Session persistence — save/restore AI conversation states

FLOWORKOS_gateway.description: Multi-channel gateway — web, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, REST

FLOWORKOS_context_guard.description: Context window monitor — auto-compact at 80% capacity

FLOWORKOS_mcp_client.description: MCP protocol client — connect to external tool servers via SSE

FLOWORKOS_voice_tts.description: Text-to-speech — browser, ElevenLabs, OpenAI, Google providers

FLOWORKOS_media_pipeline.description: Media processing — vision analysis, Whisper transcription, MIME detection

FLOWORKOS_env_loader.description: Environment config loader — reads .env, auto-wires services

FLOWORKOS_connector.description: Universal Tool Connector — auto-discovers & hot-loads tools in any language

tool_summary.connector_tools: dynamic — loaded from tools/ directory at runtime

how_to_evolve.new_capability: Create a new folder in tools/ with manifest.json + entry file
how_to_evolve.new_thinking: Store insights in memory/KB via remember()
how_to_evolve.better_tools: Create tools/tool_name_v2/ (new version, don't edit original)

compile_status.note: Brain compiled to V8 bytecode. Source files preserved.
